content: We can frame Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement as the base layer for a multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanism, creating a two-stage self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or supervised data while resolving its limitation of blind spots from fixed single-perspective feedback. This hybrid framework leverages the consistency checks from multi-perspective self-reflection to correct the gradual drift that can occur when Self-Refine iteratively refines an initially flawed starting output.
